title: Sen. Banks, Rep. Mrvan Push for Northwest Indiana Hydrogen Hub
content: Senator Jim Banks (R-Ind.) and Representative Frank Mrvan (IN-01) sent a bipartisan letter to Energy Secretary Chris Wright urging the Trump administration to prioritize Northwest Indiana as a regional Hydrogen Hub.  They highlighted the regionâ€™s unmatched manufacturing strength, existing energy infrastructure, and readiness to lead in blue hydrogen production using natural gas and carbon capture.  The lawmakers argued that investing in Indianaâ€™s hydrogen project would support President Trumpâ€™s push for American energy dominance, create jobs, lower costs, and strengthen the U.S. industrial base for decades to come.
author: Analysts Account
